The Service class¶

class services.service.Service(object)¶

The Service class is not intended to be used by the user directly in normal circumstances. It subclasses twisted.web.resource to handle connnection requests.

Private definition¶

services.service.Service(name, services, pages, response)
Parameters:
  • name (string) – name of the service
  • services – hierarchical dictionary containing the registration of different names and assciated actions for services.
  • pages – hierarchical dictionary containing the registration of different names and assciated actions for serving pages.
Response :

instance of the class handling the required type of response.
services.service.render_POST(request)¶
services.service.render_GET(request)¶

These methods implement the twisted required methods to handle respectively POST and GET requests. Besides handling the right response type (defined when creating a Services.Server.Server object), it handles data decoding and errors.

find_handler(postpath,handlers):

Works recursively to find the right handler (if defined) for the current url.
